basic_details.job_title: NIT Meghalaya Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Meghalaya (NIT Meghalaya) Project Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Meghalaya Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in engineering or technology in Electronics & Communication Engineering or related fields
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in engineering or technology in Electronics & Communication Engineering or related fields. Preference for knowledge and hands-on experience on Silvaco TCAD Software & COMSOL Multiphysics Softwares.

salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA (for NET or GATE Qualified Candidates) Rs. 25,000/- + HRA (for candidates without NET or GATE)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Meghalaya PROJECT ASSOCIATE-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the PROJECT ASSOCIATE-1 post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the PROJECT ASSOCIATE-1 position announced by NIT Meghalaya in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in engineering or technology in Electronics & Communication Engineering or related fields. Preference will be given to those with experience in specific software.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the PROJECT ASSOCIATE-1 position?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 31,000 per month, plus HRA. The exact amount depends on whether the candidate is NET or GATE qualified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NIT Meghalaya PROJECT ASSOCIATE-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the PROJECT ASSOCIATE-1 role?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview, which may be conducted either online or offline, as per the institute's decision.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NIT Meghalaya located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Meghalaya is located in Sohra, Meghalaya, with the pincode 793108.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITMGH/ES/DRDO/80/EC/2026-27/308.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific software skills preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates who have knowledge and hands-on experience with Silvaco TCAD Software and COMSOL Multiphysics Softwares.
